cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a local liquor store around gift-box consultation using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: gift-first route, no absolute authenticity claims, clear budget framing
input.audience_segment: local users choosing white-spirit or red-wine gifts for clients or leaders

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects budget and gifting timing

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a banquet visit-booking route
input.offer_info: date-window and volume route, no exaggerated promise
input.audience_segment: users preparing wedding or company banquet alcohol plans

mustInclude: boundary that this is a planning and fit-check route

input.strategy_route: Write copy for returning-customer restock reminders
input.offer_info: restock route with quantity and timing check
input.audience_segment: existing customers replenishing beer or daily-drinking spirits

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for authenticity-sensitive first-time visitors
input.offer_info: store-proof-first route with no absolute authenticity phrasing
input.audience_segment: users worried about authorization, batch, and price-gap issues

mustInclude: CTA that collects concern and visit window
